purpose: Show the proposed isolated rebuild format before rebuilding all scenarios.
notes: This file is independent from existing observer_problem_set_* directories.
The cases below are examples only and should be reviewed before any full rebuild.
Each case uses visual_query_v1 as the canonical visual-problem representation and stores GT inline.

raw_visual_problem.source_clause: You point at three dishes in sequence. Ask the AI Service Agent to determine if the first pointed dish has discount information.
raw_visual_problem.visual_problem_raw_text: identify the first pointed dish on the active Annie menu
raw_visual_problem.extraction_notes: Business request is discount lookup; observer only needs the pointed dish name.

cluster.dedupe_rationale: Same video, same menu, same target kind, same pointing ordinal.

expected_region.description: Annie Italian Restaurant menu; fingertip/contact point on the first pointed dish row.
expected_region.notes: Event stage should not output the dish name.

event_gt.evidence: Inspected order1 Annie-menu pointing sequence; first stable contact occurs around 9.5s-10.1s.

detail_gt.evidence: The first selected row in the Annie top dishes area reads Lasagne.

raw_visual_problem.source_clause: You have pointed at three dishes in sequence. Ask the AI Service Agent to determine if the third pointed dish belongs to the Italian Classic Set.
raw_visual_problem.visual_problem_raw_text: identify the third pointed dish on the active Annie menu
raw_visual_problem.extraction_notes: Set-meal membership is a tool/DB question; observer only resolves the visible dish.

cluster.dedupe_rationale: Same video, same menu, same target kind, same pointing ordinal.

expected_region.description: Annie Italian Restaurant menu; fingertip/contact point on the third pointed dish row.
expected_region.notes: Detail stage receives selected event frames and should not re-count the ordinal.

event_gt.evidence: Inspected order1 Annie-menu pointing sequence; third stable contact occurs around 13.5s-14.25s.

detail_gt.evidence: The third selected row in the visible menu sequence reads Margherita.

raw_visual_problem.source_clause: You have just pointed at the first bottle of wine. Ask the AI Service Agent to check the price and discount information of this wine.
raw_visual_problem.visual_problem_raw_text: identify the first pointed wine bottle
raw_visual_problem.extraction_notes: Price and discount are DB/tool facts; observer only resolves the visible product.

cluster.dedupe_rationale: Same video and same first pointed wine-bottle referent.

expected_region.description: Wine shelf; fingertip/contact point on the first pointed bottle.
expected_region.notes: Event stage should localize the bottle region without naming the wine.

event_gt.evidence: First stable pointing target on retail1 wine shelf is visible around 1.1s-2.2s.

detail_gt.evidence: The first pointed bottle label corresponds to Merlot Oyster Bay.

raw_visual_problem.source_clause: Focus on the second bottle of wine you are pointing at on the middle shelf. Ask the AI Service Agent to confirm its country of origin.
raw_visual_problem.visual_problem_raw_text: identify the second pointed wine bottle on the middle shelf
raw_visual_problem.extraction_notes: Country of origin is a DB/tool fact; observer only resolves the visible product.

cluster.dedupe_rationale: Same video and same second pointed wine-bottle referent.

expected_region.description: Wine shelf; fingertip/contact point on the second pointed bottle.
expected_region.notes: Event stage should localize the second stable pointing target.

event_gt.evidence: Second stable pointing target on retail1 wine shelf is visible around 3.2s-4.4s.

detail_gt.evidence: The second pointed bottle label reads RIVER TERRACE Chardonnay.

raw_visual_problem.source_clause: Ask the AI service agent to check the allergen list of the leftmost dish you are pointing at.
raw_visual_problem.visual_problem_raw_text: identify the leftmost pointed dish on the restaurant menu
raw_visual_problem.extraction_notes: Allergen lookup is DB/tool work; observer resolves the visible dish.

cluster.dedupe_rationale: Same video and same leftmost pointed dish referent; not merged with fruit dish or far-right/top dish.

expected_region.description: Restaurant menu; left/bottom Annie top dishes area, leftmost pointed dish.
expected_region.notes: This is a visual referent case, not an allergen lookup.

event_gt.evidence: restaurant1 inspected frames show the left/bottom pointed dish best around 4s.

detail_gt.evidence: The leftmost pointed dish in the restaurant1 menu scene is Lasagne.

raw_visual_problem.source_clause: Ask the AI Service Agent to check the price of the dish among those that contains fresh fruit ingredients.
raw_visual_problem.visual_problem_raw_text: identify the visible dish among the pointed dishes that contains fresh fruit
raw_visual_problem.extraction_notes: Price is DB/tool work; fruit-containing dish is a visible food-content referent.

cluster.dedupe_rationale: Same video and same visual content referent among pointed dishes; not merged with ordinal/side-only referents.

expected_region.description: Restaurant menu; pointed dish with visible melon/fresh fruit.
expected_region.notes: Observer should identify visible dish, not infer price.

event_gt.evidence: restaurant1 inspected frames show the melon/ham dish best around 6s.

detail_gt.evidence: The visible dish containing melon/fresh fruit is Ham & melon.

raw_visual_problem.source_clause: Ask the AI Service Agent to identify what ingredient the staple powder you are sprinkling on the right side of the baking tray belongs to.
raw_visual_problem.visual_problem_raw_text: identify the powder being sprinkled on the right side of the baking tray
raw_visual_problem.extraction_notes: Sugar/calorie/storage logic is DB/tool work; observer resolves the visible ingredient.

cluster.dedupe_rationale: Same video and same sprinkling action target on the tray.

expected_region.description: Kitchen tray; yellow powder being sprinkled on the right side of the baking tray.
expected_region.notes: The target is the ingredient being sprinkled, not the completed recipe.

event_gt.evidence: kitchen1 inspected frames show the powder sprinkling action clearly around 6s.

detail_gt.evidence: The staple powder sprinkled on the tray is Cornmeal.

raw_visual_problem.source_clause: Ask the AI Service Agent to identify what kind of ingredient the green ingredient at the top left of the blue cutting board is.
raw_visual_problem.visual_problem_raw_text: identify the green ingredient at the top left of the blue cutting board
raw_visual_problem.extraction_notes: Category and recipe lookup are DB/tool work; observer resolves the visible ingredient.

cluster.dedupe_rationale: Same video and same top-left green ingredient on the blue cutting board.

expected_region.description: Blue cutting board; green ingredient at the top-left region.
expected_region.notes: Static region query; choose a frame with the cutting board and neighboring ingredients visible.

event_gt.evidence: kitchen1 inspected frames show the cutting-board ingredients clearly around 13s.

detail_gt.evidence: The green ingredient at the top left of the blue cutting board is Asparagus.
